design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Castlevania: Symphony of the Night through its core metroidvania loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Enemy patterns and equipment reach define melee approach; spells consume MP with distinct roles.
constraints: MP and HP pools gate spell spam
Equipment types affect swing arcs and range
gdd_outline.core_loop: Fight enemies for XP and loot, equip weapons and armor, acquire relics that grant movement forms, backtrack through colored doors and vertical gates, defeat bosses including Richter, and unlock the Inverted Castle.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Gold buys consumables and gear; drops feed experimentation with weapon types.
gdd_outline.overview: Symphony of the Night is a metroidvania RPG where Alucard explores Dracula's castle and its inverted counterpart, gaining relic abilities, leveling stats, and swapping equipment to reach gated areas.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Level-ups raise core stats; relics and wolf/bat/mist forms open traversal gates.

mechanics.expression: Relic abilities like double jump, mist, and bat form reopen earlier castle areas.
mechanics.map_notes: Relic abilities like double jump, mist, and bat form reopen earlier castle areas.

mechanics.expression: Colored doors, breakable walls, and height gates require specific relics or equipment.
mechanics.map_notes: Colored doors, breakable walls, and height gates require specific relics or equipment.

mechanics.expression: Level-ups increase HP, MP, and stats; equipment modifies attack, defense, and attributes.
mechanics.map_notes: Level-ups increase HP, MP, and stats; equipment modifies attack, defense, and attributes.

mechanics.expression: Inverted Castle doubles the explorable map after defeating Richter, flipping layout and enemies.
mechanics.map_notes: Inverted Castle doubles the explorable map after defeating Richter, flipping layout and enemies.

mechanics.expression: Swords, clubs, shields, helmets, and accessories slot into distinct equipment categories.
mechanics.map_notes: Swords, clubs, shields, helmets, and accessories slot into distinct equipment categories.

mechanics.expression: Major bosses and story events unlock new castle wings and the inverted map.
mechanics.map_notes: Major bosses and story events unlock new castle wings and the inverted map.

mechanics.expression: HP depletes on damage; MP fuels spells and sub-weapons.
mechanics.map_notes: HP depletes on damage; MP fuels spells and sub-weapons.

mechanics.expression: Spikes, poison water, and crushing hazards throughout the castle.
mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, poison water, and crushing hazards throughout the castle.

mechanics.expression: Relics, max HP upgrades, and heart containers hidden in secret rooms.
mechanics.map_notes: Relics, max HP upgrades, and heart containers hidden in secret rooms.

mechanics.expression: Primary sword swings execute immediately on button press.
mechanics.map_notes: Primary sword swings execute immediately on button press.

mechanics.expression: Enemies drop hearts, gold, and equipment; merchants sell items.
mechanics.map_notes: Enemies drop hearts, gold, and equipment; merchants sell items.

mechanics.expression: Sword and secondary weapon swings are the core offensive loop.
mechanics.map_notes: Sword and secondary weapon swings are the core offensive loop.

mechanics.expression: Dracula and several bosses shift forms and attack patterns across phases.
mechanics.map_notes: Dracula and several bosses shift forms and attack patterns across phases.

mechanics.expression: Breakable walls, hidden rooms, and optional boss encounters reward exploration.
mechanics.map_notes: Breakable walls, hidden rooms, and optional boss encounters reward exploration.

mechanics.expression: Bosses follow learnable attack sequences and vulnerability windows.
mechanics.map_notes: Bosses follow learnable attack sequences and vulnerability windows.

mechanics.expression: Gold spent at merchants for consumables, equipment, and spell books.
mechanics.map_notes: Gold spent at merchants for consumables, equipment, and spell books.

mechanics.expression: Sub-weapons and spells consume hearts or MP.
mechanics.map_notes: Sub-weapons and spells consume hearts or MP.

mechanics.expression: MP pool limits spell casting frequency.
mechanics.map_notes: MP pool limits spell casting frequency.

mechanics.expression: Boss wind-ups and enemy attack animations signal incoming damage.
mechanics.map_notes: Boss wind-ups and enemy attack animations signal incoming damage.

mechanics.expression: Fixed enemy rooms respawn for XP and loot farming.
mechanics.map_notes: Fixed enemy rooms respawn for XP and loot farming.

narrative.core_loop: Explore the interconnected castle, defeat enemies for XP and loot, equip weapons and armor, acquire relic abilities that open new paths, backtrack to gated areas, and defeat bosses to progress toward the final confrontation.
narrative.description: Richter Belmont has vanished and Dracula's castle reappears. Alucard explores the inverted and upright castle, gaining RPG stats, equipment, and relic abilities to reach previously inaccessible areas and confront Shaft and Dracula.

title: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night Gameplay Map
